title: get mahasiswa pendaftaran with valid token
description: Verify that an authenticated student can successfully retrieve the registration form and eligibility status via GET /mahasiswa/pendaftaran, receiving a 200 response with correct eligibility information.

title: post mahasiswa pendaftaran with valid registration data
description: Verify that an authenticated student can submit a valid registration payload to POST /mahasiswa/pendaftaran and receive a 201 Created response with registration id and status 'pending'.

title: post mahasiswa pendaftaran with ineligible student data
description: Verify that submitting registration data for an ineligible student to POST /mahasiswa/pendaftaran returns a 422 Validation Error with detailed fields indicating missing SKS, GPA, or prerequisite failures.

title: post mahasiswa pendaftaran without authentication
description: Verify that attempting to submit registration to POST /mahasiswa/pendaftaran without a Bearer token returns a 401 Unauthorized response.

title: get admin dashboard with admin token
description: Verify that an admin user can access GET /admin with a valid admin Bearer token and receive a 200 response containing dashboard statistics and the current_phase field.

title: post admin switch phase with valid phase
description: Verify that an admin can switch the KKN business phase by POSTing a valid phase payload to /admin/dashboard/switch-phase and receive a 200 response confirming the new phase.

title: post admin switch phase with invalid phase
description: Verify that POSTing an invalid phase value to /admin/dashboard/switch-phase returns a 422 Validation Error with message 'invalid phase'.

title: post admin switch phase with non admin token
description: Verify that a non-admin user attempting to switch phases via POST /admin/dashboard/switch-phase receives a 403 Forbidden response.

title: get api v1 periods with valid token
description: Verify that an authorized external system can retrieve the list of KKN periods via GET /api/v1/periods with a valid API token and receive a 200 response with periods and metadata.

title: get api v1 periods without token
description: Verify that accessing GET /api/v1/periods without an API token returns a 401 Unauthorized response.
